nasb.text: where Jesus has entered as a forerunner for us, having become a high priest forever according to the order of Melchizedek.

esv.text: where Jesus has gone as a forerunner on our behalf, having become a high priest forever after the order of Melchizedek.

cnv.text: 耶穌已經為我們作先鋒進入了幔子裡面；他是照著麥基洗德的體系，成了永遠的大祭司。

ccb.text: 耶稣照麦基洗德的模式成了永远的大祭司，祂替我们先进入了圣幕内。

csbs.text: 耶稣已经为我们做先锋进入了那里，照着麦基洗德的等级做大祭司，直到永远。
